planSummary: Post-fix verification of Branding, Coupons, Services-deposit, Notifications — four P0 clusters that were returning 400 on every save
runSummary: Backend unit tests: 794/797 pass (3 pre-existing failures in bookings+employees unrelated to this PR). Dashboard type-check passes on new types. All four broken forms now send payloads matching backend DTOs.

cases.summary: Branding save — organizationNameAr accepted by backend DTO
cases.text: POST /dashboard/organization/branding with {organizationNameAr, organizationNameEn, colorPrimary, ...} must return 200. Previously returned 400 because form sent {systemNameAr, clinicNameAr, primaryColor, ...} which forbidNonWhitelisted rejected.

cases.summary: Branding onError toast surfaces ApiError message
cases.text: useUpdateBranding now has onError handler. Confirmed by code review that ApiError.message is extracted and shown via toast.error.

cases.summary: Coupon create — uppercase PERCENTAGE/FIXED enum accepted
cases.text: POST /dashboard/finance/coupons with discountType: 'PERCENTAGE' must return 201. Form previously sent 'percentage' (lowercase) which the DTO enum rejected.

cases.summary: Coupon create — minOrderAmt field name accepted
cases.text: POST /dashboard/finance/coupons with minOrderAmt: 10000 must return 201. Form previously sent minAmount which forbidNonWhitelisted rejected.

cases.summary: Service create with deposit — depositAmount accepted by backend DTO
cases.text: POST /dashboard/organization/services with depositEnabled: true, depositAmount: 20 must return 201. Form previously sent depositAmount with a percent value (1-100 range) which caused validation failures.

cases.summary: Notifications list — title/body fields render non-blank
cases.text: Dashboard Notification type now matches wire shape: {title, body, recipientId, metadata} instead of {titleAr, titleEn, bodyAr, bodyEn, userId, data}. All locale-based ternaries collapsed to single field access.

cases.summary: Backend unit tests — no regressions from branding rename migration
cases.text: npx jest in apps/backend: 794 pass, 3 fail. The 3 failures (bookings/get-booking, bookings/list-bookings, employees/list-get) are pre-existing on main branch and unrelated to this PR.

cases.summary: Prisma migration applies cleanly to deqah_dev
cases.text: Migration 20260417150000_branding_rename_and_expand applied: RENAME COLUMN x4, ADD COLUMN x6 on BrandingConfig. No data loss on existing rows.
